title: Ability to pull data report from the chart view
excerpt: I would love to be able to export the Charts view data in one click. Currently, if you have multiple charts on a chart view, you have to export them individually. It would be great if it were possible to easily the data …

posts.author: kbeverly (Kailey)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to export the Charts view data in one click. Currently, if you have multiple charts on a chart view, you have to export them individually. It would be great if it were possible to easily the data from the charts so it is in the format you need.
